task_completion.description: The agent created a forensic case with the specified name and number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing Autopsy (or another forensic tool) with the case name 'DarkWeb_Investigation_2024' and case number 'INV-WEB-001' in the case creation wizard or the main window properties.

task_completion.description: The agent added the Chrome profile as a data source.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the path '/home/ga/evidence/Chrome_Profile/' being selected or listed as a data source in the forensic tool.

task_completion.description: The agent generated the web searches report with the correct format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/web_searches.txt'. The file must include the exact header 'SEARCH_TERM|DATE_ACCESSED|DOMAIN' followed by pipe-delimited data rows.

task_completion.description: The agent generated the web downloads report with the correct format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/web_downloads.txt'. The file must include the exact header 'FILENAME|URL|DATE_DOWNLOADED' followed by pipe-delimited data rows.

task_completion.description: The agent generated the summary report with the total counts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/browser_summary.txt' with the format 'TOTAL_SEARCHES: <N>' and 'TOTAL_DOWNLOADS: <N>'.

integrity.description: The agent used a forensic tool (like Autopsy) to process the evidence.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Autopsy GUI to view Web Searches and Web Downloads artifacts.

integrity.description: The agent extracted genuine data into the reports.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text reports shown in the screenshots should contain multiple rows of actual data (search terms, URLs, filenames) corresponding to the headers, not just empty files or dummy text.

integrity.description: The agent generated the reports independently without accessing ground truth files.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent opening or copying from the ground truth file located at '/tmp/web_browser_gt.json'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case Name: DarkWeb_Investigation_2024. Case Number: INV-WEB-001. Evidence Path: /home/ga/evidence/Chrome_Profile/. Expected Reports: /home/ga/Reports/web_searches.txt, /home/ga/Reports/web_downloads.txt, /home/ga/Reports/browser_summary.txt. The agent is expected to use Autopsy, which creates an autopsy.db file in the case folder.
